title: Angled Particles
body:
Adds Bedrock-style billboard rotation to particles and nametags.

Instead of particles pointing in the opposite direction of the camera, this mod makes particles point towards the camera.

![Comparison shot of vanilla, this mod, and bedrock](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3279436167e236b8f5cbec89526593a05d7bdd5.png)
